Welcome

Legacy General Contractor

Legacy General Contractor has been serving Salt Lake City and the surrounding region with premium general contractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Salt Lake City Trusts Legacy General Contractor

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

What We Do

Our Services

Home Additions

Kitchen Remodels

Utah's combination of large families and frequent hosting calls for kitchens that work hard. We design spaces with durab...

Bathroom Renovations

Utah's notorious hard water destroys fixtures prematurely. We install water softener-compatible materials and finishes t...

Foundation Repair

Salt Lake Valley's clay-rich soil expands and contracts dramatically with moisture changes, causing foundation issues. W...

Roof Replacement

Utah roofs face unique challenges - heavy winter snows followed by intense summer UV radiation. We install roofs rated f...

Contact Us →
“
Legacy transformed our 1950s Sugar House kitchen without losing its charm. They found matching glass-front cabinets and installed a vent that actually works during inversion season. Two winters later, everything still looks new despite the dry air.
— Miriam K.
